query:
UPDATE product_variants
SET 
  sellingPriceFOB = CASE
    WHEN costPriceRMB IS NOT NULL AND costPriceRMB != '0' THEN ROUND(CAST(costPriceRMB AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / 7.2 * 1.3, 2)
    WHEN sellingPriceRMB IS NOT NULL AND sellingPriceRMB != '0' THEN ROUND(CAST(sellingPriceRMB AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / 7.2, 2)
    ELSE '100.00'
  END
WHERE sellingPriceFOB IS NULL OR sellingPriceFOB = '0' OR sellingPriceFOB = '0.00';
